name: Flavored Pizza Doughs
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Prosciutto, cut into 1/4-inch dice (remove meat from casings and crumble)
4 ounces fresh sausage (remove meat from casings and crumble)
1/4 cup freshly grated Provolone, Caciocavallo, Parmesan, or Romano cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the basic pizza dough as usual, letting it double in bulk.
2. Punch down the dough and knead in the flavoring of your choice until well distributed.
3. Refrigerate the dough for 15 to 20 minutes before stretching or rolling it out, or let it rise again before shaping.
Note: If the flavored dough becomes sticky after additional ingredients have been kneaded in, simply knead in a small amount of flour until the dough is smooth and no longer sticks.
